raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "The oil pipeline restart process has been concerning from the moment this pipeline project began.",
    "SB 542 seeks to provide a clear opportunity for the public to weigh in on the restart process.",
    "SB 542 strengthens required integrity testing to better protect communities from a possible oil spill in the future.",
    "Testing the integrity of a pipeline is vital to protecting the environment.",
    "The testing process used in the pipeline that spilled in 2015 was not thorough enough to detect corrosion that eventually led to the spill.",
    "A more comprehensive testing method, the hydrostatic test, seeks to better assess the safety and integrity of the pipeline."
  ]
